features.evidence: and it s clearly a more capable chip

well, historically, macbook air has been super easy to recommend, but with this m3, they also lowered the price of m2 by a hundred bucks and discontinued the m1 However, this is not exactly new to the industry, but the base price and the base spec has almost become this weird fallacy
the first highlight is its build quality
it also has a satisfying sound you can take it into a coffee shop and type on it without causing too much attention to yourself

and it also appears that the base storage on m3 is much improved However, maybe, possibly not, but obviously it s a bummer having way slower storage on a new m2 and that extra time transferring large files, that adds up over time
